features.label: mentions or discusses 'jailbreak' or 'jailbreaking' related prompts or techniques
contains the term 'chatgpt' (in various capitalizations and slight misspellings) explicitly mentioned in the main body of the text
contains repeated mentions of error messages or server issues related to ChatGPT or associated services
mentions the 'memory' feature of ChatGPT or related memory management topics
Contains explicit requests or inquiries for recommendations of free or affordable AI tools or services
contains text written in or discussing multiple human languages, including non-English languages and multilingual content
each positive sample contains the exact word 'ChatGPT' at the beginning of a sentence
contains explicit references to web search, internet browsing, or searching the web
contains the phrase or question asking if 'ChatGPT is down' or references to ChatGPT being down or not working
contains multiple references to AI technology and its impact in news-style or report-style text excerpts
mentions the term 'Gemini' or 'Google Gemini'
contains the word 'prompt' or 'prompts'
discusses the impact of AI on employment, job replacement, or economic disruption
contains self-promotion or announcements of AI-powered tools, apps, or projects with links to demos, repositories, or websites
mentions ChatGPT or AI in a positive, appreciative, or grateful context
mentions DALL-E or Dall E explicitly by name
contains extensive use of the letter 'o' spaced out or emphasized (e.g., 'o1', 'o3-mini-high', 'o n e h o u r p h o t o')
mentions or discusses 'AI' explicitly (using the term 'AI' or 'ai')
contains philosophical or spiritual discussions about consciousness, existence, or the nature of reality
mentions a recent decline or downgrade in GPT-4 or ChatGPT's performance, especially relating to coding ability or response quality
discusses issues related to phone number verification or phone number usage during account creation or login
mentions Sam Altman and events related to his firing or OpenAI board decisions
Contains detailed political content specifically discussing Donald Trump, including critiques, analyses, or scenarios involving his presidency or policies
contains explicit mentions of the word 'model' referring to AI or language models
mentions or discusses image generation or AI-generated images
contains references to AI-caused human extinction, apocalypse scenarios, or existential threats posed by AI
all samples contain questions about integrating, customizing, accessing, or using ChatGPT or GPT models via APIs, custom training, plugins, or embedding in applications

contain questions or statements about limitations, behaviors, or responses of AI/chat models, specifically focusing on issues like answer length limits, refusal to answer, follow-up questions, or answer format
mentions message limits or caps related to ChatGPT usage
mentions or contains cooking recipes or detailed food preparation instructions
mentions or discusses 'Advanced Voice Mode'
mentions Turnitin AI detection or accusations of AI-generated content in academic writing
mentions or discusses subscribing to ChatGPT Plus or paying for a premium subscription
discusses analyzing, summarizing, or extracting information specifically from large PDF documents or scanned files
discussions about ChatGPT generating false or fabricated information (hallucinations), including it lying or making up quotes, and users confronting it about these inaccuracies
mentions using ChatGPT as a personal therapist or for emotional/mental health support
mentions OpenAI explicitly by name
contains references to jokes, humor, or comedic content
mentions iOS or iPhone apps or issues related specifically to ChatGPT or AI apps on iOS devices
mentions 'Bing' explicitly in the text
discussions about missing, deleted, archived, or recoverable chat histories
contains explicit expressions of frustration or anger using strong negative language and swear words
discusses writing stories, novels, or creative writing assistance using AI language models
contains explicit comparisons or questions asking which AI model or version is better
contain user complaints about ChatGPT or GPT models ignoring, forgetting, or not following custom instructions or prompts
contain long-form narrative texts or extended storytelling excerpts
mentions GPT-4 or GPT 4 explicitly (including variants like 'GPT4', 'GPT-4', 'GPT 4.5', 'GPT 4.0 Turbo')
discusses or requests code generation, coding help, or programming-related issues
mentions or discusses suspected AI-generated or bot-driven activity on social media platforms
contain requests for help or advice related to business, marketing, resume building, hiring, or AI tool integration
contains prompts or requests for ChatGPT to create or imagine a personalized image, portrait, or depiction based on the user's personality, life, or characteristics
contain questions explicitly asking how people use ChatGPT or related AI tools in their daily life or for practical purposes
mentions or involves acting as a Dungeon Master (DM) or game master for role-playing games, especially Dungeons & Dragons (D&D) or text-based RPGs
mentions waiting for or asking about access to new ChatGPT features such as plugins, voice chat, image generation, or dataset updates
discussions explicitly about content policy violations, censorship, or platform banning related to adult, violent, or sensitive content
mentions missing, removed, or hidden user interface buttons or features in ChatGPT or related apps
mentions or discusses movies, movie plots, movie characters, or movie-related creative content
mentions the model name '4o' or variants thereof (e.g., '4-o')
mentions or discusses Large Language Models (LLMs) explicitly
contains profanity or vulgar language
mentions unexpected, unexplained, or seemingly unauthorized conversations or messages appearing in the ChatGPT chat history
contain or discuss AI-generated song lyrics or AI-assisted songwriting
contains explicit or implicit references to AI-generated romantic or sexual partners, including AI girlfriends, waifus, or sex bots
discusses or contains examples of incorrect or faulty mathematical calculations or reasoning
